description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the alpine:latest Docker image with two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job in the test stage that runs the command `echo Run Tests`. Add a deploy to staging job in the deploy stage that runs `echo Deploy staging`, is limited to the master branch, and deploys to the staging environment. Add a deploy to production job in the deploy stage that runs `echo Deploy production`, is limited to the master branch, runs manually, and deploys to the production environment.
